Easy.title: Two Sum
Easy.desc: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

Easy.title: Palindrome Number
Easy.desc: Given an integer x, return true if x is a palindrome, and false otherwise.

Easy.title: Reverse String
Easy.desc: Write a function that reverses a string.

Easy.title: Sum Array
Easy.desc: Return the sum of all elements in an array.

Easy.title: Find Maximum
Easy.desc: Return the largest number in the array.

Easy.title: Find Minimum
Easy.desc: Return the smallest number in the array.

Easy.title: Count Vowels
Easy.desc: Count the number of vowels (a,e,i,o,u) in a string.

Easy.title: Is Even
Easy.desc: Return True if n is even, False otherwise.

Easy.title: Is Odd
Easy.desc: Return True if n is odd, False otherwise.

Easy.title: Factorial
Easy.desc: Return the factorial of n.

Easy.title: Fibonacci
Easy.desc: Return the n-th Fibonacci number (n=0 returns 0, n=1 returns 1).

Easy.title: GCD
Easy.desc: Return the greatest common divisor of a and b.

Easy.title: Check Prime
Easy.desc: Return True if n is a prime number, False otherwise.

Easy.title: Sum of Digits
Easy.desc: Return the sum of the digits of a positive integer n.

Easy.title: Reverse Digits
Easy.desc: Reverse the digits of a number. (Assume positive)

Easy.title: Count Set Bits
Easy.desc: Count the number of 1s in the binary representation of n.

Easy.title: FizzBuzz
Easy.desc: Return 'Fizz' if n is divisible by 3, 'Buzz' if by 5, 'FizzBuzz' if both, else return to_string(n).

Easy.title: Leap Year
Easy.desc: Return True if year is a leap year, False otherwise.

Easy.title: String Length
Easy.desc: Return the length of the string.

Easy.title: Count Consonants
Easy.desc: Count consonants in a string (letters that are not vowels).

Easy.title: Square Root
Easy.desc: Return the integer part of the square root of n.

Easy.title: Power of Two
Easy.desc: Return True if n is a power of two, False otherwise.

Easy.title: Remove Spaces
Easy.desc: Return the string with all spaces removed.

Easy.title: Anagram Check
Easy.desc: Return True if s1 is an anagram of s2.

Easy.title: First Element
Easy.desc: Return the first element of the array. If empty, return -1.

Easy.title: Last Element
Easy.desc: Return the last element of the array. If empty, return -1.

Easy.title: Average
Easy.desc: Return the average of the array of numbers. If empty, return 0.

Easy.title: Celsius to Fahrenheit
Easy.desc: Convert Celsius temperature to Fahrenheit (F = C * 9/5 + 32).

Easy.title: Fahrenheit to Celsius
Easy.desc: Convert Fahrenheit to Celsius (C = (F - 32) * 5/9).

Easy.title: Multiply Elements
Easy.desc: Return the product of all elements in the array.

Easy.title: Count Occurrences
Easy.desc: Return the number of times target appears in arr.

Easy.title: Absolute Difference
Easy.desc: Return the absolute difference between a and b.

Easy.title: Is Divisible
Easy.desc: Return True if a is divisible by b, False otherwise.

Easy.title: String to Int
Easy.desc: Convert string to integer.

Easy.title: Int to String
Easy.desc: Convert integer to string.

Easy.title: Count Evens
Easy.desc: Return the number of even numbers in an array.

Easy.title: Count Odds
Easy.desc: Return the number of odd numbers in an array.

Easy.title: Add One
Easy.desc: Add 1 to the given number.

Easy.title: Double
Easy.desc: Return the number multiplied by 2.

Easy.title: Contains Substring
Easy.desc: Return True if sub is present in s.

Medium.title: Reverse Int
Medium.desc: Reverse the digits of a signed integer. (Return 0 on overflow normally, here assume standard 32-bit)

Medium.title: Valid Parentheses
Medium.desc: Given a string of '()', '{}', '[]', return True if closed properly.

Medium.title: Find Peak Element
Medium.desc: Find a peak element in an array and return its index.

Medium.title: Sort Colors
Medium.desc: Given an array of 0s, 1s, and 2s, sort them in-place and return the array.

Medium.title: Kth Largest
Medium.desc: Find the kth largest element in an array.

Medium.title: Longest Unique Substring
Medium.desc: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

Medium.title: Container With Most Water
Medium.desc: Find two lines that together with x-axis form a container, such that the container contains the most water.

Medium.title: Coin Change
Medium.desc: Return the fewest number of coins to make up an amount, or -1 if impossible.

Medium.title: Jump Game
Medium.desc: Return True if you can reach the last index of the array, False otherwise.

Medium.title: Search in Rotated Array
Medium.desc: Find target in a rotated sorted array. Return index or -1.

Medium.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
Medium.desc: Return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

Medium.title: House Robber
Medium.desc: Determine max money you can rob without robbing adjacent houses.

Medium.title: Word Break
Medium.desc: Return True if s can be segmented into a sequence of dictionary words.

Medium.title: Find Duplicate Number
Medium.desc: Given an array of size n+1 with integers in [1,n], return the one repeated number.

Medium.title: Subarray Sum K
Medium.desc: Return the total number of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.

Medium.title: Max Product Subarray
Medium.desc: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest product.

Hard.title: First Missing Positive
Hard.desc: Return the smallest missing positive integer in an unsorted array.

Hard.title: Trapping Rain Water
Hard.desc: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map, compute how much water it can trap.

Hard.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
Hard.desc: Return the median of the two sorted arrays.

Hard.title: Longest Valid Parentheses
Hard.desc: Find the length of the longest valid well-formed parentheses substring.

Hard.title: Wildcard Matching
Hard.desc: Implement wildcard pattern matching with '?' and '*'.

Hard.title: Jump Game II
Hard.desc: Return the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index.

Hard.title: Edit Distance
Hard.desc: Return min operations to convert word1 to word2.

Hard.title: Distinct Subsequences
Hard.desc: Return the number of distinct subsequences of s which equals t.

Hard.title: Candy
Hard.desc: Return min candies to distribute based on ratings.

Hard.title: Sliding Window Maximum
Hard.desc: Return the max sliding window array of size k.
